positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a stylized celestial river of bioluminescent plankton flowing through a dense, exotic jungle canopy at twilight. The main subject is a large, friendly stylized creature—a luminous, gentle otter—floating on the river, looking curiously at the viewer. The composition should be symmetrical and centrally focused, with rich silhouettes of tropical leaves and flowing lines of glowing light contrasting against a deep indigo and teal color palette. Use a detailed etching or woodcut style with glowing accents, emphasizing clean lines, high contrast, and perfect print scalability, perfect for a t-shirt graphic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, lowres, poorly drawn, malformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, cropped, out of frame, low contrast
